name: scitex_todo_app
label: Todo
subtitle: Dependency-graph view of the scitex-todo task store
about: View the scitex-todo task dependency graph in a browser. Nodes are colored by status; edges show depends_on and blocks relationships.
description: scitex-todo board is a read-only browser view of the canonical YAML task store. It renders the task dependency DAG with React Flow: nodes colored by status (goal, pending, in_progress, blocked, done, deferred, failed), depends_on arrows, and blocks inhibition edges.
author: ywatanabe
capabilities: Render the task dependency graph (DAG) in the browser
Resolve the task store via the project -> user -> bundled chain
